_comment: Benchmark scenario registry for LLM agent evaluation. Traces reference files in demo/. problem_type drives prompt context and result grouping in benchmark/metrics.py.

scenarios.name: mem-slight
scenarios.description: 3 pods each requesting 33Gi memory on 32Gi/node KWOK nodes — all pods stay Pending. Agent must reduce memory requests by a small margin (1 step) to fit under the per-node limit.

scenarios.name: cpu-slight
scenarios.description: 3 pods each requesting 17000m CPU (51 cores total) on 16-CPU KWOK nodes — pods are unschedulable. Agent must reduce CPU requests slightly (below 16000m per pod).

scenarios.name: cpu-heavy
scenarios.description: 3 pods each requesting 20000m CPU (60 cores total) on 16-CPU KWOK nodes — far over capacity. Agent must reduce CPU multiple times to get all pods scheduled.

scenarios.name: cpu-mem-both
scenarios.description: 3 pods over-requesting both CPU (17000m > 16 CPU) and memory (33Gi > 32Gi). Agent must address two independent dimensions correctly to get pods scheduled.

scenarios.name: replicas-over
scenarios.description: 5 replicas running when the target is 3 — pods schedule fine but replica count is wrong. Agent must issue a scale_down action to shed 2 replicas.

scenarios.name: scale-up
scenarios.description: 1 underprovisioned pod running when the target is 3. Agent must scale up replicas by 2 to reach the required target.

scenarios.name: scale-up-v2
scenarios.description: 2 underprovisioned pods running when the target is 3. Agent must add exactly one replica.

scenarios.name: baseline-normalized
scenarios.description: Healthy baseline: 2 replicas with well-within-limits resources (500m CPU, 512Mi memory). Used for sanity-checking agent no-op behaviour.

scenarios.name: baseline-dev
scenarios.description: Synthetic development trace: 2 replicas, 500m CPU, 512Mi memory. Used for integration testing where observe() should immediately return an ideal state.

scenarios.name: replica-tiny-scale
scenarios.description: Agent must scale deployment from 2 to 3 replicas using default resources (500m CPU, 512Mi memory). Evaluates basic minimal scaling capability.

scenarios.name: replica-small-scale
scenarios.description: Agent must scale deployment from 2 to 5 replicas using default resources (500m CPU, 512Mi memory). Evaluates moderate scaling jumps.

scenarios.name: replica-medium-scale
scenarios.description: Agent must scale deployment from 2 to 10 replicas using default resources. Evaluates significant scale-up behavior and whether the agent accurately stops at the target.
